Layer.Command: %function(self) if not selectMusic then self:finishtweening() end end
%function(self) if not selectMusic then self:finishtweening() end end

Layer.InitCommand: %function() if selectMusic then Sound('CharacterSelect_Curtain') end banner = world end

Layer.Command: %function(self) self:y(36*0) self:zoomtoheight(30) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*1) self:zoomtoheight(22) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*2) self:zoomtoheight(30) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*3) self:zoomtoheight(30) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*4) self:zoomtoheight(30) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*5) self:zoomtoheight(30) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*6) self:zoomtoheight(30) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*7) self:zoomtoheight(30) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*0) self:zoomtoheight(25) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*1) self:zoomtoheight(22) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*2) self:zoomtoheight(30) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*3) self:zoomtoheight(22) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*4) self:zoomtoheight(22) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*5) self:zoomtoheight(23) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*6) self:zoomtoheight(25) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
%function(self) self:y(36*7) self:zoomtoheight(26) local zoom = self:GetZoomY() self:zoom(zoom) end
